name: Timmy Teepell
subject: First official Bobby Jindal t-shirt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend,

It was an awesome week. I hope you had a chance to watch Bobby's announcement speech... he killed it.

There was a line in particular that really angered the left:

_"I'm sick and tired of people dividing Americans. And I'm done with all this talk about hyphenated Americans. We are not Indian-Americans, Irish-Americans, African-Americans, rich Americans, or poor Americans - **we are all Americans**."_
---

When Bobby's parents moved to the United States, they came here to be Americans. The left can't understand that. I think it's because they don't believe America is the greatest country in the world.

**The liberal narrative that developed this week was disgusting: apparently Bobby isn't brown enough for them.**

The Washington Post even wrote: _"There's not much Indian left in Bobby Jindal."_

Yes. That quote ran in an actual newspaper. No wonder newspapers are dying.

[Well, this will make the left even more upset. We are now selling the first limited edition t-shirt of the campaign, and I want you to be the first to know about it.](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77445%7c828930%7c635435&digest=jc4jUe4q2Yxdig6TXXGwvg&sysid=1)

[This limited edition shirt will only be on sale for a short time, so make sure to get your order in today before they sell out.](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77447%7c828930%7c635435&digest=q%2f3xSblPpi5%2fI5e61vR3Qg&sysid=1)

Have a great weekend,
Timmy Teepell
Campaign Manager, Jindal for President

name: Columba Bush
subject: ¡Todos por Jeb!
body:
Friend,

It's been nearly two weeks since Jeb started his campaign, and the enthusiasm so far has been amazing.

I'm so proud of him, and I know he appreciates everyone's support.

[**Friend , that's why I'm asking for your help. Our first big deadline is Tuesday at midnight, and Jeb needs our support with a contribution of $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can. **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wzdqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhsndf_zlwssdfz.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This deadline is important. You've heard the media; everyone is watching, waiting to add up numbers and waiting to make judgments.

Jeb's doing his part. He's out there earning it, working hard every hour. [**He 's answering every question, showing his heart and I know it would be a big lift for him if you joined our campaign today with a gift of $100, $50, or $25 before this big deadline. **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yclryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwgbss_zlwssdfz.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

From Dubuque, IA to Derry, NH, Jeb's sharing his plan to boost growth, create jobs and cut taxes for the American people. Please join us so we can continue: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pdjtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkglchq_zlwssdfz.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We plan to take nothing and no one for granted, especially you, and we thank you for joining us and going all in for Jeb.

Thank you Friend.

Columba

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: FLOTUS, Senator, Secretary of State -- and my friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary's first big deadline. | Friend --

This election really matters.

It matters for the six million young people who are out of school and out of work. It matters for the families being torn apart by senseless immigration policies. It matters for the parents who work full time and still have to choose between paying the rent and feeding their children.

**[Americans need a champion -- and I think that champion is Hillary Clinton. The first fundraising deadline of the election is this Tuesday, so if you’re with Hillary, it’s vitally important to contribute $1 to her campaign right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI5Mzc4NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNzY4NjIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This Tuesday’s deadline is the campaign’s first opportunity for us to show the strength and breadth of our support. To say, “See? All these people care about helping families get ahead -- they care enough to donate their hard-earned dollars to build the America we envision.”

For more than two decades, I have been fortunate to know Hillary as a colleague, friend, Senator, Secretary of State, First Lady, mother, wife, aunt, grandmother, and as a woman who will never shy away from a fight.

Hillary’s ready to fight for American families, and she’s ready to fight to win this election -- but she’s counting on us to step up for her, and for all those Americans who so badly need her as their champion.

**We can’t win this fight without you. Donate $1 to Hillary for America before Tuesday’s deadline:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI5Mzc4NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNzY4NjIxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you so much,

Barbara Boxer

|

name: George P. Bush
subject: Democrats are worried
body:
Friend,

I know mom reached out, but I wanted to follow up.

Dad has been hitting the trail hard since announcing his candidacy earlier this month, sharing his vision and listening to voters. He even convinced me to pitch in as I was in Nevada last week -- we're picking up steam but we can't let up now.

Dad needs your help, no two ways about it. [**The end of quarter deadline is two days away, and it is crucial we meet our goal of $200,000. Will you help us by chipping in $100, $50, or $25 right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rtkfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsvtkj_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This is the first deadline of the campaign, and Dad is going to have to disclose just how many people are supporting his campaign -- everyone will be watching.

There are only two outcomes when midnight Tuesday rolls around:

1. We'll hit our goal and send the other campaigns a clear message of our strength.
2. We'll fail and send a message to Hillary that we're not serious: that the path to the White House will be unobstructed.

**I don 't know about you, but failure isn't an option for me. It's not an option for America as that's what this campaign is about: the future of our country.**

[**Friend , I'm asking you to do your duty, and step up to support Dad before this critical end of month deadline and chip in $100, $50, $25, or anything you can right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xjrlkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqybjpd_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Since Dad's launch, political pundits have been admitting Hillary and her staff are worried. And now they're watching to see if we will have the money to compete against the Clinton machine.

Let's keep them watching, and show that Dad's supporters shouldn't be taken lightly.

Thanks, Friend, I knew I could count on you: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zwljvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqclwbm_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you all for your support.

George P. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rttfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsvtkn_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

subject: I’m concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

With just over 48 hours left until the FEC's critical fundraising reporting deadline, the media are already writing their stories...

They tell us it's already been decided. That those of us who believe in liberty and limited government should step aside for someone else "to get their turn."

Fellow Conservative, our government is not a political soap opera ruled by political bluebloods.

The American people call the shots.

And they understand we can't continue to spend like there's no tomorrow. They understand we can't continue to allow our President, our Courts, and our Congress to trash the constitutional principles that made America the greatest, freest nation on Earth.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28711660:27582297130:m:1:879035888:D646DFF9A809D0DE25BFF029D7938C59:r)**?

Time is running out until the FEC's June 30th deadline where my campaign must wrap up fundraising for this quarter and release our financial reports.

I know the national media continues to see the strong poll numbers my campaign continues to post.

In fact, I'm the only Republican presidential candidate who leads Hillary Clinton in five key presidential swing states, which President Obama won.

But they also know the summer months are when campaigns build their grassroots organizations.

_It's when the groundwork for victory in the coming Republican primaries must be laid_.

The media and the political establishment of BOTH parties want to know if you and I have the grassroots support it will take to win.

That's why, with your help, I want to send heads spinning all over the country.

The truth is, the Big Government status quo Americans have grown used to under members of BOTH parties can no longer be tolerated.

Look to the chaos going on right now across the Atlantic.

_Greece is on the brink of financial ruin_.

Their ATMs are running out of cash. The European Union is frantically attempting to reach a bailout deal with the Greek government.

It's hard to watch this madness without a feeling in the pit of your stomach that all of this is destined to happen here in the United States unless we change course FAST.

But Fellow Conservative, I'm afraid there is one critical difference.

_There will be no one to bail us out should this ever happen in the United Sates_.

That's why this fundraising quarter is so critical.

A strong fundraising quarter will help me rally even more Americans with my strong stands to:

*** Cut taxes and spending. My 14.5% flat-rate tax plan would drive a stake through the heart of the IRS, return $2 TRILLION to the American people, and create 1.4 million new jobs;

*** End the reign of career politicians by passing term limits;

*** Force Members of Congress to read the bills they vote on -- instead of springing last-minute thousand page bills on the American people that are laden with handouts to those with the best lobbyists;

*** Repeal ALL of ObamaCare. Every last word of this horrendous government takeover of our healthcare;

*** Audit the Federal Reserve;

*** Protect the entire Bill of Rights -- including the Second Amendment, our right to religious liberty, the God-given right to life, and our right to privacy from government snooping.

Polls show these strong stands can and will win the day -- if I can count on your support.

Your support is absolutely critical to help me bypass the national media and go straight to the American people with my message of liberty.

But Fellow Conservative, it's not just about winning.

It's about restoring the freedom and prosperity that should be every American's birthright.

That will not happen without a fight.

**[So please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28711660:27582297130:m:1:879035888:D646DFF9A809D0DE25BFF029D7938C59:r)**.

Your support will make all the difference.

subject: Let's try something different

We tried it the other way, and look where it has got us.

Let's endorse our own conservative principles, and not back down.

Curt Anderson

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Have you given up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=1)
---
Dear Friend -- I know many of you are discouraged about the recent Supreme Court ruling on same-sex marriage. It is perfectly normal to be discouraged. _**But that doesn’t mean that we will ever give up on our convictions and principles.**_ I believe that marriage is the foundational principle of all strong families. I also believe that the only way for the family to be strong is if marriage is defined as what God designated - a sacred union between**one man and one woman.** I want to tell you that you are not alone. In just the last 48 hours, _**millions**_ of people have shown their support for traditional marriage. [Ranging from well-received TV interviews](http://www.ricksantorum.com/fnc_marriage?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=2) to [feedback from Facebook posts](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum%2Fphotos%2Fa.468157332369.259209.44746457369%2F10153400446192370%2F%3Ftype%3D1%26theater&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=3), countless Americans like you have voiced their strong support for traditional marriage. However, unless we elect a president that shares your conservative, pro-family beliefs, nothing will change. I’m asking you to [stand with me now and take part in our Guardian Program](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=4) and help us raise or donate $100 by Tuesday's critical fundraising deadline. Many of you have already made contributions, and I sincerely thank you. But as we’ve seen this week, the relentless liberal agenda knows no pause, and if we want to take back America, we need to fight back just as hard. If you _haven’t_ made your commitment to join the Guardian Program, I encourage you to take that step now. **This is the time** \- right now - to get off the sidelines and stand up for what you believe in. If you don't, the aggressive social liberal agenda will prevail. I know you are surely getting lots of emails asking for your urgently needed support, but we _**truly**_ need it right now. [Click here to join me in taking a stand for traditional marriage.](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=5) \- Rick
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_11&n=6)
